author: chatgpt-codex-connector
body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Add auto-merge setup to the owner ask**

This recommended owner reply only covers repo name, visibility, and project cut, but the week-one curriculum depends on Day 3’s “PR merges itself on green.” I checked the cited `.github/workflows/auto-merge-enabler.yml` in this repo: it says the enabler is inert until “Allow auto-merge” is enabled and a default-branch ruleset requires a status check, and its guard refuses to arm when zero required contexts exist. For the recommended new private repo, those repo-admin settings are not covered by slices 1–5 or this OWNER-ACTION, so following the blueprint leaves the auto-merge demo disabled. Add those setup clicks here, or explicitly drop self-merge from the curriculum.

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
